examples.title: AdaBoost Algorithm
examples.code:
Initialize weights w_i = 1/N
For m=1 to M:
  Train weak learner h_m with weights w
  Compute error ε_m
  α_m = 0.5 * ln((1-ε_m)/ε_m)
  Update weights: w_i = w_i * exp(α_m * I(y_i ≠ h_m(x_i)))
  Normalize weights
Final classifier: H(x) = sign(Σ α_m h_m(x))
examples.explanation: Shows key steps: weight initialization, learner training, error calculation, weight update
